content:
Actually, I don’t have access to the internet in real-time. Instead, I generate answers based on a large amount of information I was trained on, which includes books, websites, and other texts available up until my knowledge cutoff date (June 2024). This training allows me to provide information, answer questions, and assist with a wide range of topics by recognizing patterns and recalling facts from that data.

So, when I respond to your questions, I’m not looking up information online at that moment. Rather, I’m using what I’ve learned during training to generate the most relevant and accurate response I can. This is why sometimes my answers might not include the very latest news or developments that occurred after my training ended.
